steps.title: Calculate land area
steps.content:
Subtract water area from total area:
$$87.4 - 9.6 = 77.8 \text{ square miles}$$

steps.title: Calculate population density
steps.content:
Divide population by land area:
$$\frac{540,000}{77.8} \approx 6,941 \text{ people per square mile}$$
This is closest to Choice B — 6,940 is correct.
